results.rendered_html:
ardana (von ard)
1〉 adj.
a〉 unruhig sich bewegend  NIR. 6,33 .
— b〉 in Unruhe versetzend, bedrängend: balaṃ parabalārdanam  VIŚV. 4,17 . parapurārdana  R. 2,1,33 . Vgl. janārdana.
— 2〉 f. ˚nā das Bitten  AK. 3,3,6 .  H. 388 .
— 3〉 n. Aufregung, Unruhe  SUŚR. 1,290,17 .

results.rendered_html:
ardana a.
1 Distressing, afflicting, tormenting; pura˚, bala˚.
2 Moving restlessly, being agitated.
— naṃ [bhāve lyuṭ] Distressing, afflicting; pain, trouble, anxiety, disturbance, excitement, agitation, restlessness.
— naṃ, -nā
1 Going, moving.
2 Asking, begging.
3 Killing, hurting, giving pain.
